blocks.text: Community Tested Routers

The following routers have been reported to work reliably from a number of users.
High End (AXE / WiFi 6E) - TP-Link AXE300/AXE16000 ($450 US)
High End (AX / WiFi 6) - Asus RT-AX86U ($300 US)
Dedicated (BE / Wifi 7) - TP-Link BE9300/BE550 ($200-$300 US)
Dedicated (AXE / WiFi 6E) - Davolink 'Kevin' Minion 6E ($129 US)
Dedicated (AXE / WiFi 6E) - TP-Link Archer AXE75/AXE5400 ($160-$200 US)
Dedicated AP (AXE / WiFi 6E) - ARRIS Surfboard W6U (single port)
Network Bridge (AXE / WiFi 6E) - ARRIS Surfboard Thruster W6B (2-piece kit)
Dedicated (AX / WiFi 6) - GL.iNet Beryl GL-MT3000 ($90 US)
Low End (AC / WiFi 5) - GL.iNet Opal GL-SFT1200 ($50 US)
Low End (AC / WiFi 5) - TP-Link Archer C6 or A6 ($40 US)

TP-Link AX and Huawei routers have been known to have issues we are unable to identify. Higher end TP-Link AX/AXE routers not listed here may work well but as with any router not on this list, should be considered untested.
The TP-Link Archer AXE5400 is not the same thing as the Deco AXE5400. The latter is a mesh router and may not work as expected.
Community Tested Routers

The following routers have been reported to work reliably from a number of users.
High End (AXE) - TP-Link AXE300/AXE16000 ($450 US)
High End (AX) - Asus RT-AX86U ($300 US)

Low End (AC) - TP-Link Archer C6 or A6 ($40 US)

TP-Link AX and Huawei routers have been known to have issues we are unable to identify. Higher end TP-Link AX/AXE routers not listed here may work well but as with any router not on this list, should be considered untested.
The TP-Link Archer AXE5400 is not the same thing as the Deco AXE5400. The latter is a mesh router and may not work as expected.

pages.name: tplinkc6
pages.title: TP-Link Archer C6 or A6
pages.description: Low End (AC) - TP-Link C6 or A6

blocks.text: TP-Link Archer C6 or A6
The TPLink C6/A6 is a good dedicated router specifically for wireless VR usage, it is a budget router that works well for Virtual Desktop.
GL.iNet Opal GL-SFT1200
The GL.iNet Opal GL-SFT1200 is a good dedicated router for bridging and repeating an existing wireless network.
GL.iNet Beryl GL-MT3000

The GL.iNet Beryl GL-MT3000 is a good dedicated router for bridging and repeating an existing wireless network. Unlike the GL.iNet Opal GL-SFT1200, the Beryl supports DFS channels which can be useful when there are limited clear 5ghz channels. Currently you will need to update this to beta firmware 4.6.0 or later for proper performance.
TP-Link Archer AXE75/AXE5400
The TP-Link Archer AXE75/AXE5400 is a WiFi 6e router that has been tested as a good dedicated router for wireless VR streaming.
TP-Link BE9300/BE550

The TP-Link BE9300/BE550 is a Wifi 7 (Works for WiFi 6e) router that has been tested as a good dedicated router for wireless VR streaming. It has 4 2.5GbE LAN ports and 1 2.5GbE WAN port.
*Note: Headsets do not support Wifi 7 but Wifi 7 routers function as WiFi 6e as well
Davolink Minion 6E
The 'Kevin' Router is a good dedicated 6E Router, offering one of the best prices on a 6E Router/AP that has been tested.
Asus RT-AX86U

The RT-AX86U is a great home router as well as being great for wireless streaming. 
 It supports DFS channels, which decrease interference in congested areas.
TP-Link AXE300/AXE16000

The TP-Link AXE300/AXE16000 is a great home router as well as being great for wireless streaming. 
 It is a full featured WiFi 6E/AXE router with solid performance.

pages.name: arrissurfboardw6u
pages.title: ARRIS Surfboard W6U
pages.description: Dedicated AP (AXE / WiFi 6E) - ARRIS Surfboard W6U

blocks.text: ARRIS Surfboard W6U

The ARRIS Surfboard W6U is a WiFi 6E access point with a single 2.5 Gbps Ethernet port. It adds a dedicated 6 GHz band to your existing router/network. Not a standalone router - requires connection to an existing router.

blocks.name: Info
blocks.value:
__Wireless Type__: WiFi 6E / AXE
__Ports__: 1x 2.5 GbE
__Type__: Access Point (not a router)

pages.name: arrissurfboardw6b
pages.title: ARRIS Surfboard Thruster W6B
pages.description: Network Bridge (AXE / WiFi 6E) - ARRIS Surfboard Thruster W6B

blocks.text: ARRIS Surfboard Thruster W6B

The ARRIS Surfboard Thruster W6B is a WiFi 6E network bridge kit (2-piece). It wirelessly bridges ethernet from your router to your PC/console over a dedicated 6 GHz connection. One unit connects to your router, the other to your device. Pre-paired out of box. Single 2.5 GbE port on each unit.

blocks.name: Info
blocks.value:
__Wireless Type__: WiFi 6E / AXE (6 GHz)
__Ports__: 1x 2.5 GbE per unit
__Type__: Network Bridge (2-piece kit)
